title: goodenia glabra
intro: Goodenia glabra, also known as the hairy goodenia, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the Goodeniaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Goodenia glabra include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Goodenia glabra can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
